ownership_contract.task_goal: Freeze dual-site validate-only write-precheck runtime-consumption truth.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode assets and read-only issue/PR metadata.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode registry/schema/fixture, two package post-check contracts, offline validator, and LODE-266 carriers.
ownership_constraints: Static truth is not live runtime success.
Any drift, missing/stale refs, write/submit request, challenge, or submitted value other than false fails closed.
non_goals: No write, submit, merge, issue closeout, or live-success claim
ownership_contract.output_format: Worktree, branch, head, files, tests, PR, and residual risks.

ownership_constraints: Static truth is not live runtime success.
Any drift, missing/stale refs, write/submit request, challenge, or submitted value other than false fails closed.

delegation_evidence.rationale: No subagent execution tool is available; shared registry and Loom carriers require serial ownership.

integration_evidence: Both package identities bind registry, manifest, and lock.
Mutation tests reject drift, stale or missing refs, write/submit, and submitted=true.

residual_changes.reason: Requires submitted=false in the bound post-check result.
Requires submitted=false in the bound post-check result.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: Static Lode assets and offline validation only.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Core/Harbor consume static admission truth; no live success.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade for runtime, browser/session, live evidence storage, result ownership, or write behavior.
